query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_cycles,
  COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as distinct_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) as distinct_devices,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN userId IS NOT NULL THEN userId END) as users_with_ids,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN deviceId IS NOT NULL THEN deviceId END) as devices_with_ids
FROM cycle_history;
command:

  COUNT(*) as total_cycles,
  COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as distinct_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) as distinct_devices,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN userId IS NOT NULL THEN userId END) as users_with_ids,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN deviceId IS NOT NULL THEN deviceId END) as devices_with_ids
FROM cycle_history;
